findings: CRITICAL: stampede.sh has no guard for LAUNCHED==0 - continues to auto-attach even if all agents fail (stampede.sh:1318-1358)
Individual commander launch failures write failed to swarm-state.json (stampede.sh:1096-1149)
Preflight check catches pre-launch env issues but not post-spawn failures (stampede.sh:198-294)
No timeout-based stuck-launch detection in stampede.sh - only 5s PID check (stampede.sh:1278)
Commander agent spec requires status=failed if no Squad Leads launched (stampede-commander.agent.md:146)
timeout_s and retry_budget defined but no explicit timeout-triggered failure path documented
gaps: No LAUNCHED==0 guard in stampede.sh; no post-launch watchdog; no explicit timeout-failure path; no fleet-level state.json update on total launch failure
